headlines.description: Fulham boosted their hopes of European qualification as Ryan Sessegnon's first-half goal earned them a 1-0 win over a lacklustre Aston Villa at Craven Cottage.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sessegnon strike edges Fulham past Aston Villa

headlines.description: British-record signing Alexander Isak scored as Liverpool moved closer to securing Champions League football next season but the 3-1 victory over Crystal Palace owed as much to third-choice goalkeeper Freddie Woodman.
headlines.shortLinkText: Isak inspires Liverpool to third straight PL win

headlines.description: Callum Wilson strikes late to keep West Ham survival hopes alive
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson winner boosts West Ham survival hopes

headlines.description: João Palhinha's 82nd-minute tap-in earned Tottenham a first Premier League win of 2026 with a 1-0 victory at Wolves but they remain in the relegation zone.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs win at Wolves but remain in relegation zone

headlines.description: Arsenal returned to the top of the Premier League after a 1-0 win against Newcastle on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eberechi Eze downs Newcastle, sends Arsenal top of Premier League

events.name: Brighton & Hove Albion at Newcastle United

Brighton & Hove Albion at Leeds United
